attributes.action: Stop illegal immigrants getting council houses
attributes.additional_details: Illegal immigrants should not be given council or social housing, the illegals must be returned to their home country, the government should also stop these illegals from entering British territorial waters amd return the boats back to France by whatever means necessary,  council housing should only be given to the British people and not to illegals
attributes.background: The government should not be giving illegals council houses to get them out of hotels, the government should return them to their home country

rejection.details:
We're not sure if you want all those who arrive illegally to be deported and not allowed to apply for asylum, or if you want to stop the government scheme through which councils can apply for grants to build council housing for asylum seekers. You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you'd like to happen. 

You may wish to sign these petitions which are currently open: 

Withdraw from ECHR & stop processing asylum claims until Channel crossings stop: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/741099

Deport asylum seekers from safe countries & review current asylum seekers: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/741209

Detain anyone arriving in the UK illegally: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759367
